meta.title: IoT Botnets in 3 Minutes
meta.description: This compilation clip from a 45-minute S4xEurope video tells you what you need to know about Mirai - The Weapon, Hajime - The Protector?, and BrickerBot - The Vigilante. Great work by Pascal Geenens of Radware.
